<<THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS>>  
THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS ARE DERIVED BY MAXIMIZING THE LOG-LIKELIHOOD FUNCTION FOR EACH PARAMETER. THE MLE FOR MU_X IS THE SAMPLE MEAN OF THE PRE-TREATMENT DATA. THE MLE FOR MU_Y IS THE SAMPLE MEAN OF THE POST-TREATMENT DATA. THE MLE FOR SIGMA_X_SQUARED IS THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF THE PRE-TREATMENT DATA. THE MLE FOR SIGMA_Y_SQUARED IS THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF THE POST-TREATMENT DATA. THE MLE FOR SIGMA_XY IS THE COVARIANCE BETWEEN THE PRE-TREATMENT AND POST-TREATMENT DATA.  

<<THE HYPOTHESIS TEST>>  
THE HYPOTHESIS TEST IS CONDUCTED BY COMPARING THE TEST STATISTIC TO A DISTRIBUTION. THE NULL HYPOTHESIS IS THAT THE DRUG HAS NO EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE. THE ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESIS IS THAT THE DRUG DOES HAVE A SIGNIFICANT EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE. THE TEST STATISTIC IS THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN THE MEAN PRE-TREATMENT AND POST-TREATMENT DATA. THE REJECTION CRITERIA IS THAT THE TEST STATISTIC IS GREATER THAN THE 95% CONFIDENCE LIMIT. THE REJECTION REGION IS THE AREA WHERE THE TEST STATISTIC IS GREATER THAN THE 95% CONFIDENCE LIMIT.  

<<THE ESTIMATION OF PARAMETERS>>  
THE ESTIMATION OF PARAMETERS IS DONE BY MAXIMIZING THE LOG-LIKELIHOOD FUNCTION. THE MLE FOR MU_X IS THE SAMPLE MEAN OF THE PRE-TREATMENT DATA. THE MLE FOR MU_Y IS THE SAMPLE MEAN OF THE POST-TREATMENT DATA. THE MLE FOR SIGMA_X_SQUARED IS THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF THE PRE-TREATMENT DATA. THE MLE FOR SIGMA_Y_SQUARED IS THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF THE POST-TREATMENT DATA. THE MLE FOR SIGMA_XY IS THE COVARIANCE BETWEEN THE PRE-TREATMENT AND POST-TREATMENT DATA.
